IBAN{{ vendor.iban or "—" }}

İletişim{{ vendor.contact or "—" }}
Durum{{ "Aktif" if vendor.active else "Pasif" }}

{{ vendor.notes }}

Cari Özet
Toplam Gelen{{ total_gelen | money }}
Ödenen{{ total_odenen | money }}
Bakiye{{ (total_gelen - total_odenen) | money }}
Faturalar

NoTipTarihTutarDurum
{{ inv.invoice_no or ("#" ~ inv.id) }} {{ inv.invoice_type }} {{ inv.invoice_date | date_tr }} {{ inv.amount | money }} {{ inv.status }}

Çekler
{% for c in cheques %} {% endfor %}
Çek NoTutarVadeDurum
{{ c.cheque_no or "—" }} {{ c.amount | money }} {{ c.due_date | date_tr }} {{ c.status }}
{% endif %}
